STS2HOSHINO-RELOAD_SETTINGS.title: Reload Settings
STS2HOSHINO-IS_VEWING_RELOAD_BUTTON.hove:
Choose whether to display the reload button.
When hidden, it can only be used via shortcut key (r).
STS2HOSHINO-BUTTON_POSITION.title: Reload Button Position
STS2HOSHINO-BUTTON_POSITION.hover.title: Reload Button Position
STS2HOSHINO-BUTTON_POSITION.hover.desc: Set the relative position of the button from the End Turn button.
